column1: 2004-07-11‚ÄéurlLink    Can they get much cuter? urlLink
2004-07-11‚Äé"Degrassi; The Next Generation is one of the few shows on modern television that gives veiwers a look into what the life of an average teenager is like. Nobody has superpowers
column3: they get nervous asking their crushes on dates
column5: and have plenty of problems of their own. This show deals with important issues such as rape
column16: and many other issues that are relevant in the lives of teenagers across the globe. The flaws that are present in all the characters make the show seem very real
column17: and veiwers are able to relate not only to the situations
column18: but to the people as well. No more of this Lizzie McGuire perfect ""We'll learn out lesson and be friend's forever by the end of the episode"" bull crap! Degrassi shows real life. Friends will fall apart
column20: and people will make mistakes---and guess what?! It's not always ok in the end. In fact
column21: it rarely is. This website is a small tribute to Marco Del Rossi and Dylan Michalchuck
column23: but I will also be posting things about my other two favorite characters Paige Michalchuck (yes
column24: she IS Dylan's younger sister) and her boyfriend Spinner Mason in addition to things concerning the show in general
column25: and also just some random blabbing that I'm prone to take part in.   Until I post again
